hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
⊢ S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length

classical
    have hdisj :
        Disjoint initPart (midPart ++ finalPart) := by
      refine List.disjoint_left.2 ?_
      intro c hc_init hc_other
      have hc_init' : isInitialCall S c = true := by
        simpa [initPart] using (List.mem_filter.1 hc_init).2
      cases List.mem_append.1 hc_other with
      | inl hc_mid =>
          have hc_mid' : decide (¬isInitialCall S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall S c = true) = true := by
            simpa [midPart] using (List.mem_filter.1 hc_mid).2
          have : (¬isInitialCall S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall S c = true) := by
            simpa using (of_decide_true hc_mid')
          exact this.1 hc_init'
      | inr hc_fin =>
          have hc_fin' : isFinalCall S c = true := by
            simpa [finalPart] using (List.mem_filter.1 hc_fin).2
          have hc_mid' : decide (¬isInitialCall S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall S c = true) = false := by
            apply decide_eq_false
            intro h
            exact h.2 hc_fin'
          have : c ∈ midPart := by
            refine List.mem_filter.2 ?_
            exact ⟨hc_init, by simpa [midPart]⟩
          exact (List.not_mem_filter.2 ⟨hc_init, by simpa [midPart]⟩) this
    have hsub :
        initPart ++ midPart ++ finalPart <+ S := by
      have h1 : initPart <+ S := by
        exact List.filter_sublist (fun c => isInitialCall S c) S
      have h2 : midPart <+ S := by
        exact List.filter_sublist (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall S c = true)) S
      have h3 : finalPart <+ S := by
        exact List.filter_sublist (fun c => isFinalCall S c) S
      exact (h1.append_right).trans ((h2.append_right).trans h3)
    have hperm :
        S ~ initPart ++ midPart ++ finalPart := by
      refine (List.Sublist.perm_of_length_eq hsub ?_).symm
      have hcount :
          ∀ c ∈ S,
            (isInitialCall S c = true) +
              (decide (¬isInitialCall S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall S c = true) = true) +
              (isFinalCall S c = true) = 1 := by
        intro c hc
        by_cases hI : isInitialCall S c = true
        · simp [hI]
        · by_cases hF : isFinalCall S c = true
          · have : decide (¬isInitialCall S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall S c = true) = false := by
              apply decide_eq_false
              intro h
              exact h.2 hF
            simp [hI, hF, this]
          · have : decide (¬isInitialCall S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall S c = true) = true := by
              apply decide_eq_true
              exact ⟨hI, hF⟩
            simp [hI, hF, this]
      have :
          (initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length) = S.length := by
        -- use counting by partition of boolean predicates
        have hin : initPart.length = (S.filter (fun c => isInitialCall S c)).length := by
          rfl
        have hmid : midPart.length =
            (S.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall S c = true))).length := by
          rfl
        have hfin : finalPart.length = (S.filter (fun c => isFinalCall S c)).length := by
          rfl
        -- `simp` can close it by evaluating filters pointwise via `hcount`
        simpa [initPart, midPart, finalPart, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using
          (by
            -- convert to `S.length = ...` via permutation length preservation
            rfl : initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length =
              (S.filter (fun c => isInitialCall S c)).length +
              (S.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall S c = true))).length +
              (S.filter (fun c => isFinalCall S c)).length)
      simpa [List.length_append, Nat.add_assoc] using this.symm
    have := hperm.length_eq
    simpa [List.length_append, Nat.add_assoc] using this.symm
